creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 153765
svn diff for security/libressl

This patch updates LibreSSL to 2.1.4. As this also bumps the shlib versions it requires an update to the ports Framework as well.

Additionally this adds CPE info consistent with http://web.nvd.nist.gov/view/cpe/detail?cpeId=306305
